sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel documentation available for this NES title

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle-based locomotion
special_mechanics.description: Player operates motorcycle and hovercraft as means of transportation rather than direct character movement

special_mechanics.name: Isometric perspective movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses oblique/isometric perspective which affects perceived movement and player control feel

feel_descriptors: difficult to control (due to isometric perspective)
tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. Sources provide gameplay descriptions and critical reception rather than technical movement parameters. Reviews note the isometric perspective made controls initially difficult to master. No ROM-level physics documentation available. Game features puzzle-solving and obstacle avoidance alongside combat.
